results.justification: EXACT TWIN — gateway allow/deny/reroute + IAM RBAC/PBAC/ABAC + token-type policy IS the kapu/noa default-deny/allow + 2-tier role hierarchy mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — LLM-judge permission decisions + personalized access IS the rank-based + mana-gradient access mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — least-privilege + minimal-permission + rank-based tool access IS the 2-tier role hierarchy + kapu-zones default-deny mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — continuous information flow vs static binary IS the mana-gradient continuous score + dynamic kapu-threshold mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — RBAC for Cortex LLM + fine-grained access + role-based IS the 2-tier role hierarchy mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — unified RBAC+ABAC+DAC + Mistral 7B 98.5% IS the kapu/noa + 2-tier role + mana-gradient unified access mechanism.
LLM-based ABAC policy mining + bottom-up rules overlaps with kapu-zone default-deny rules + ai-noa permission-grant mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — taming privilege escalation + agent reputation/rank tracking IS the mana-theft reputation penalty + s_mana score mechanism.
